name: Orange Mint Slush
recipeIngredient: 1 12 oz. can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
1 6 oz. can frozen lemonade concentrate, thawed
1 liter bottle (4 1/2 cups) club soda, chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine sugar and 3 cups of the water.
2. Add mint leaves. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 2 minutes.
3. Allow cooling for 1 hour. Strain and reserve liquid.
4. In a nonmetal container, combine reserved liquid, remaining 4 cups water, and concentrate. Cover and freeze.
5. To serve, let the mixture stand at room temperature for 20 to 30 minutes or until slush consistency.
6. Spoon about 1/2 cup slush mixture into each serving glass.
7. Pour 1/4 cup of club soda over each serving.
8. Garnish with additional mint leaves, if desired.
Yield: 15 3/4 cups
